power.method: DC 36V / High PoE 45W; 60 W (DC, heater and IR on), 60 W (PoE, heater and IR on)

features: zoom lens: 60x optical zoom, 16x digital zoom

built-in analytics: Deep Learning : Automatic License Plate Recognition, Vehicle Detection, Face Detection, Face Matching, Face Tracking, Object Line Crossing Detection, Intrusion Detection (Forbidden Area Detection), ...
detection range: detection: 4965.5m, observation: 1970.4m, recognition: 993.1m, identification: 496.6m
ONVIF Compliant: Profile S, Profile G, Profile T

home_assistant.notes: Use ONVIF integration. RTSP port is 7070 by default.

blue_iris.notes: Select 'ACTi' profile. Default RTSP port is 7070.
